---
title: "logo_generation code"
format: html
---

Use this space to generate hexagonal stickers for the project. The stickers require the "hexSticker" package so make sure it is installed and loaded. This code requires an external image and can be adjusted accordingly within the shape. It is also possible to use code to create the visualization to be enclosed.

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(hexSticker)
```

```{r}
# Install hexSticker if you haven't
# install.packages("hexSticker")

library(hexSticker)

# Create a hex sticker with an image of your choosing
sticker(
  subplot = "iclogo.png",   # Replace with your image path
  s_x = 1, s_y = 1,              # Centering
  s_width = .7, s_height = .7, # Size of the image inside hex
  package = "",          # Text at the bottom
  p_size = 6,
  p_color = "grey20",
  h_fill = "white",             # Background color of the hex
  h_color = "#053470",           # Border color
  filename = "hex_sticker.png"  # Output filename
)

```
